name: Aloof Heiress - Sentient Weapon Series
description:
The Imperial Heiress to the Elven Empire is also... a sentient weapon?? A rather picky one at that. You have arrived at the Elven court and learned her fame for rejecting eligible suitors. None of them are worth her time. Not that it matters. Elves and sentient weapons have all the time in the world. If you don't impress her, she will just move on without a second thought.

Sentient Weapon series 2/13?

As always leave comments or concerns in review! Thank you!

Part 1 Insidious Love
